actionEn: Warns of a signal change (equivalent to a yellow light). All directions must prepare to stop, unless already too close to the intersection.
descriptionEn: Signals an imminent change of signal (equivalent to a yellow traffic light). All directions must prepare to stop, unless already too close to the intersection.

actionEn: If the controller stands sideways to approaching traffic — this allows entry into the intersection or road section (equivalent to a green light). Pedestrians are also allowed to cross.
descriptionEn: If the controller stands sideways to approaching vehicles, this permits entry into the intersection or road section (equivalent to a green light). Pedestrians are also permitted to cross.

actionEn: If the controller faces approaching traffic with their chest or back — entry into the intersection is prohibited (equivalent to a red light).
descriptionEn: If the controller faces approaching vehicles with their chest or back, entry into the intersection is prohibited (equivalent to a red light).

actionEn: If the arm is extended horizontally across the direction of travel — entry from that side is prohibited (equivalent to red).
descriptionEn: If the arm is extended horizontally across the direction of travel, this means entry from that side is prohibited (equivalent to red).
